name: basic1_pose
frames: Pose: standing exactly like the reference, but her head is turned in THREE-QUARTER VIEW toward the LEFT edge of the image — her face is NOT front-facing: the nose silhouette points toward the left edge, the chin is angled left, we see mostly her right cheek and the right side of her face, her left cheek is barely visible, pupils positioned at the left edge of her eyes, looking sideways curiously, small curious mouth. Body still facing front, arms at her sides. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays in her bangs exactly where it is in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: standing exactly like the reference, but her head is clearly rotated to face the RIGHT side of the frame: nose pointing right, we see more of her left cheek, pupils positioned at the right edge of her eyes, looking sideways curiously, small curious mouth, body still facing front, arms at her sides. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays in her bangs exactly where it is in the reference image, do not mirror the character.
